999.reason: [Off-by-one error: when i equals string.length()-1, the last character is still available but max() returns true, causing the loop to terminate prematurely. For an empty string, string.length()-1 is -1, so i >= -1 is true from the start, causing the program to skip processing entirely and produce no output.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Off-by-one error: when i equals string.length()-1, the last character is still available but max() returns true, causing the loop to terminate prematurely. For an empty string, string.length()-1 is -1, so i >= -1 is true from the start, causing the program to skip processing entirely and produce no output.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Off-by-one error: causes the lexical analysis loop to terminate prematurely, skipping the last character of the input. Should be i >= string.length().
